title: Venezuelan Buckwheat Pilaf
description: A hearty, one-pot dish inspired by Venezuelan cuisine, featuring buckwheat and rustic pilaf.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of Venezuelan in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the buckwheat and cook, stirring frequently, for 2-3 minutes.
Add the rustic pilaf and stir to combine.
Pour in the aerated water and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20-25 minutes or until the water is absorbed.
Garnish with chopped parsley, if desired.
